findings.evidence: New declaration at `code/TauCeti/Algebra/Coalgebra/ComoduleCat.lean:333`; Mathlib already has `structure Iso` with fields `hom`, `inv`, `hom_inv_id`, and `inv_hom_id` at `mathlib/Mathlib/CategoryTheory/Iso.lean:42-52`, giving the generated constructor `CategoryTheory.Iso.mk`.
findings.fix: Delete `isoOfHomInv` and use `CategoryTheory.Iso.mk`/structure syntax directly in `isoOfLinearEquiv`, or inline the four fields there.
findings.issue: `ComoduleCat.isoOfHomInv` is just the generic `CategoryTheory.Iso` constructor specialized to `ComoduleCat`, so it creates duplicate API for building an isomorphism from hom/inv/proof fields.

summary: The PR adds one generic isomorphism constructor wrapper that should be replaced by existing CategoryTheory API; the remaining comodule-specific linear-equivalence API is not duplicated by the searched Mathlib/TauCeti declarations.
